problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
